underlying_goal: Build and refine an Android anti-scam app (AntiGolpe IA) with WhatsApp/SMS/Email monitoring, fixing bugs, adding features, and deploying to GitHub
friction_detail: Multiple issues: deprecated telephony package needed Gradle patch, notification monitor wasn't triggering analyses, input_type was hardcoded as 'text' for all sources, and changing one label accidentally confused the user into thinking all labels changed.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined their AntiGolpe IA Flutter app fixing UI overlaps, adding SMS monitoring, fixing notification deduplication, correcting history display, and pushing to GitHub — mostly achieved with several rounds of bug fixes needed.
